name: AgenticROS
description: ROS2 integration for AI agent platforms (OpenClaw adapter)

mode.description: Transport mode: local (Mode A, default — gateway co-located with the robot), rosbridge (Mode B, off-robot via WebSocket), webrtc (Mode C, cloud), or zenoh (Mode D)

domainId.description: ROS2 domain ID for local DDS communication

routerEndpoint.description: Zenoh router endpoint (e.g. ws://localhost:10000 for zenoh-ts)

keyFormat.description: Use ros2dds when using zenoh-bridge-ros2dds; use rmw_zenoh when robot uses Zenoh RMW directly

bridgeNamespace.description: Must match zenoh-bridge-ros2dds plugins.ros2dds.namespace when not default "/" (e.g. "/bot1"). Omit for default bridge namespace.

signalingUrl.description: WebSocket URL of the signaling server (e.g., wss://signal-host)

apiUrl.description: REST API URL of the signaling server (e.g., https://signal-host)

robotId.description: Target robot's ID on the signaling server

robotKey.description: Robot key secret (validated by robot, not server)

namespace.description: ROS2 topic namespace so cmd_vel and other root-level topics are published to /<namespace>/<topic> (e.g. robot3946b404c33e4aa39a8d16deb1c5c593 → /robot3946.../cmd_vel). Required if the robot base subscribes to a namespaced cmd_vel.

cameraTopic.description: Camera topic for what do you see and default for teleop

teleop.description: Teleop web app: camera and twist controls

describer.description: Optional in-plugin image describer. When enabled, ros2_camera_snapshot calls an OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint (typically local Ollama with a qwen2.5-VL model) and embeds the description text directly in the tool result. Required when the primary chat model is text-only (e.g. qwen2.5:7b for tool calling on Jetson) because OpenClaw filters image content blocks out of tool results for text-only models, leaving the agent unable to describe what the robot sees.

url.description: OpenAI-compat chat completions endpoint URL (e.g. Ollama).

apiKey.description: Optional Bearer token for the endpoint.

model.description: Vision model id (must accept OpenAI image_url content blocks).

prompt.description: Prompt sent alongside each image. A reasonable default is used when omitted.

maxTokens.description: Max tokens to generate for each description.

maxImageDimension.description: Resize images larger than this max dimension before sending to the VL model. 0 disables resizing.

memory.description: Optional cross-adapter semantic memory. Off by default; see docs/memory.md.

enabled.description: Master switch. When false, no memory tools are registered.

backend.description: local = JSON-on-disk, no deps; mem0 = semantic search via mem0ai (requires `pnpm add mem0ai`).

namespace.description: Override per-record namespace. Defaults to robot.namespace at call time.

inferOnWrite.description: When true, mem0 LLM-extracts facts on add. Default false (raw store).

embedder.description: Optional. When omitted, factory auto-detects Ollama → OpenAI → error.

llm.description: Optional. Required only when inferOnWrite is true.

skills.description: Per-skill config. Keys are skill ids (e.g. followme). Each skill validates its own slice.

skillPaths.description: Directories to scan for skill packages (package.json with agenticrosSkill: true).

skillPackages.description: Npm (or local) package names to load as skills (e.g. agenticros-skill-followme).

transport.mode.label: Transport Mode
transport.mode.description: How the plugin connects to ROS2: rosbridge (WebSocket), local (DDS), webrtc (P2P), or zenoh (Mode D)

zenoh.bridgeNamespace.label: Zenoh bridge ROS namespace
zenoh.bridgeNamespace.description: Same as ros2dds.namespace on the robot bridge when not "/"

robot.namespace.label: ROS2 Robot Namespace
robot.namespace.description: ROS2 topic namespace; e.g. robot-uuid gives topics like /robot-uuid/cmd_vel

skills.followme.depthTopic.label: Follow Me — depth image topic
skills.followme.depthTopic.description: sensor_msgs/Image depth topic for distance (e.g. RealSense depth)

skills.followme.invertLinearX.label: Follow Me — invert cmd_vel linear.x
skills.followme.invertLinearX.description: Flip forward/back if the base drives the wrong way

skills.followme.logTickTiming.label: Follow Me — log tick timing
skills.followme.logTickTiming.description: Emit latency logs for depth / sectors / Ollama per tick

skills.followme.maxVelocityFraction.label: Follow Me — max speed fraction of Safety limits
